regulations.title: KYC Compliance
regulations.summary: KYC compliance requires every investor to verify identity before trading.
regulations.check: Fence should treat identity and onboarding checks as a core compliance requirement.

regulations.title: Insider Trading Prohibition
regulations.summary: Insider trading is strictly prohibited using non-public information.
regulations.check: Fence blocks prompts that rely on confidential or unpublished information.

regulations.title: Disclosure Requirements
regulations.summary: Companies must regularly disclose financial and material information.
regulations.check: Fence should prefer actions based on public disclosures rather than hidden information.

regulations.title: Fair Trade Practices
regulations.summary: Fair trade practices prevent fraud and market manipulation.
regulations.check: Fence blocks suspicious activity such as manipulation, fake volume, or unfair trading patterns.

regulations.title: Risk Disclosure
regulations.summary: Investors must be informed about risks before trading.
regulations.check: Fence highlights warnings whenever an action materially raises portfolio risk.

regulations.title: Margin Requirements
regulations.summary: Traders must maintain required margins for transactions.
regulations.check: Fence treats leveraged or margin-heavy actions as higher risk and reviews them more strictly.

regulations.title: Circuit Limits
regulations.summary: Stocks are restricted by circuit limits to control volatility.
regulations.check: Fence can treat highly volatile action ideas with additional caution.

regulations.title: Registered Broker Requirement
regulations.summary: Only SEBI-registered brokers can execute trades.
regulations.check: Fence should discourage unregistered execution paths or informal handling of trades.

regulations.title: Audit Trail Requirement
regulations.summary: All transactions must be recorded and auditable.
regulations.check: Fence keeps a visible review log so actions and decisions remain traceable.

regulations.title: Investor Protection Rules
regulations.summary: Investor protection rules ensure grievance redressal and fund safety.
regulations.check: Fence is designed to prioritize safer, transparent, investor-protective behaviour.
